chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. C.P.No.D- 3014 of 2017 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 16.01.2018. Mr. Rashid Raees, Advocate for petitioners. Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, Additional A.G. None present for respondent No.9. = Learned counsel for the petitioner submits that prayer clause ‘D’ of this petition has become infructuous as FIR No.130/2017 of P.S. Town Mirpurkhas has already been disposed of under ‘C’ class therefore, he does not press the prayer clause ‘D’ and further submits that he would be satisfied if this petition is disposed of with direction to the official respondents to act strictly in accordance with law. Learned A.A.G. present in court submits that the official respondents shall conduct themselves strictly in accordance with law. In view of above, this petition is disposed of with direction to the official respondents to act strictly in accordance with law. JUDGE JUDGE Tufail
